text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The G1 Hopeful Stakes is an event vital to
determining the champion of the junior year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But to King Halo, it's nothing more than a
checkpoint. She intends to gain victory with a
spectacular performance that will turn heads.
